auto.label: Chrome ZeroOmega kokonur
auto.notes: Uses the user's Chrome Default profile and lets ZeroOmega handle proxy routing.

pumc-webvpn.label: PUMC academic proxy via Chrome ZeroOmega kokonur
pumc-webvpn.notes: Uses the user's existing Chrome ZeroOmega profile named kokonur. No proxy credentials are stored here.

pumc-kokonur-zeroomega.label: PUMC academic proxy via Chrome ZeroOmega kokonur
pumc-kokonur-zeroomega.notes: Alias for pumc-webvpn. Start Chrome with this profile and select kokonur in ZeroOmega before acquisition.

sysu-carsi.label: SYSU CARSI
sysu-carsi.notes: Use CARSI user login and choose 中山大学.

sysu-portal.label: SYSU portal academic resources
sysu-portal.notes: SYSU unified portal includes academic resource access.

sysu-vpn.label: SYSU VPN
sysu-vpn.notes: SYSU VPN information page; use when tunnel-based campus-network access is required.
